name: Pokémon Tales: The Misadventures of Sirfetch'd & Pichu
original_name: Pokémon Tales: The Misadventures of Sirfetch'd & Pichu
overview: Sirfetch’d and Pichu are front and centre as the heroes of the show, which is set in a region Trainers have explored before—one that is very close to Aardman’s heart. The series will offer a unique look at the Pokémon world, told from the perspective of Pokémon, with the signature Aardman sense of character, comedy and craft.
